headline: AbbVie (ABBV) Is One Of The Major Stock To Buy According To Wall Street
summary: AbbVie Inc. (NYSE:ABBV) is one of the 10 Best Major Stocks to Buy According to Wall Street Analysts. Based on a report released on April 10, RBC Capital analyst Trung Huynh maintained a Buy rating on AbbVie Inc. (NYSE:ABBV) while also keeping the firm’s price target of $260. The firm’s price target is slightly higher […]

headline: Nxera Pharma to Receive US$10 Million Milestone Payment from AbbVie under Collaboration Targeting Neurological Diseases
summary: This marks the third milestone achieved under the collaboration and reflects the steady progress of the pipelineUnder the terms of the agreement, Nxera is eligible to receive up to US$1.2 billion in potential option, development and commercial milestones, in addition to tiered royalties based on sales Tokyo, Japan and Cambridge and London, UK, 20 April 2026 – Nxera Pharma Co., Ltd.
